title: GPU thermal throttling during outdoor operation
description: GPU temperature on jetson-orin-nav-01 rose from 65C to 92C during outdoor patrol in direct sunlight, triggering thermal throttling. Inference latency increased from 35ms to 210ms, severely impacting real-time object detection for obstacle avoidance.
root_cause: Insufficient thermal management during outdoor high-ambient-temperature operation. GPU throttled to prevent hardware damage.
